posts.author: Rennan (Rennan Souza)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I’m trying to build a structured tasks view on monday for my company and was asked to create a board that changes according to whoever is accessing it. It would always have the same structure but would only show elements tied to the person who is viewing the board.

Does anyone know if and how this could be done?
